message:
refactor(membrane): replace manual JSON formatting with serde in validation pipeline

Replace the hand-built write!() JSON string assembly in
ptr_validator's emit_structured_log with proper serde::Serialize
derives on ValidationLogRow and ValidationLogInputs structs. This
eliminates a fragile 500+ character format string and ensures valid
JSON output. The structured data remains identical — this is a
serialization-only change.

Additional changes:
- Update malloc_abi with refinements
- Expand arena memory management
- Improve page_oracle heuristics
- Add new symbol latency baseline tests and update conformance data

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
